dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: MY LADY! LADY YURI!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: LADY YURI! My LADY!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TAP

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU TRYING TO DO ON THE FIRST FLOOR?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: LADY YURI! WOULD YOU PLEASE ANSWER ME.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TAP TAP

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: AN IRREGULAR HAS STEPPED INTO THE TOWER! HE HAS OPENED THE GATE HIMSELF!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAAAT?!

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: AOF

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: YEAH! SOMEONE REALLY DID OPEN THE DOOR!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: IF THAT'S TRUE, IT'S GAME-CHANGING NEWS!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I CAN'T BELIEVE AN IRREGULAR IS ON THE FIRST FLOOR.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: OF COURSE IT'S A BIG DEAL! IT'S A BIG EVENT, EVAN!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BUT, MY LADY, HE'S NOW WITH HEADON ON THE FIRST FLOOR.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: DON'T TELL ME THAT YOU'RE GOING DOWN TO WATCH.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IN A FEW MINUTES, THE TEST WILL BEGIN!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHY SHOULDN'T I?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: AHA! NOT A BIG EVENT? WHAT?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: NO WAY! WHY WOULD YOU WANT TO WATCH THAT? DON'T YOU THINK IT'LL BE FUN?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: NOT AT ALL! IT'S DANGEROUS!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: AHAHA, YOU COWARD!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAT IF HEADON FINDS OUT?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: STOP WORRYING, YOU BABY.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: Sigh, HERE WE ARE.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: I HOPE HEADON DOESN'T SEE US.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN! LOOK OVER THERE! IT'S THE NEW GUY AND HEADON!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OH! W-WHERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: Hehe, YOU REALLY WANTED TO SEE TOO, HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WELL, SINCE WE ARE HERE... HMPH. HE DOESN'T LOOK SPECIAL AT ALL.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I THOUGHT HE WOULD BE A MONSTER, LIKE UPEK.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: THIS IS A BIT DISAPPOINTING.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY EVAN! WHAT DO YOU THINK OF HIM AS A GUIDE?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DO YOU THINK HE HAS A SECRET POWER? MAYBE HE'LL METAMORPHOSE OUT OF NOWHERE?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: HM, HE LOOKS AGILE BUT HIS BODY IS SMALL, AND HE DOESN'T LOOK LIKE A CROSS-SPECIES HYBRID.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: I DON'T FEEL THE UNUSUAL 'STRENGTH' THAT I FELT FROM THE PREVIOUS IRREGULARS. HE'S JUST AN ORDINARY HUMAN.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHAT?! REALLY?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DON'T ALL IRREGULARS HAVE A BEAM SHOOTING OUT FROM BETWEEN THEIR LEGS LIKE UPEK?!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: UPEK DOESN'T HAVE SOMETHING LIKE THAT EITHER!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: I DO THINK SOMETHING COULD SHOOT OUT, BUT NOT A BEAM.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: Sigh, WHAT A WASTE OF TIME. I WAS EXPECTING MORE.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IT IS A BIT WEIRD THOUGH.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THE IRREGULARS TILL NOW HAVE ALL BEEN EXTREMELY STRONG LIKE PHANTAMINUM OR UREK.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BUT IT SEEMS LIKE THAT GUY WON'T EVEN QUALIFY FOR THE TEST.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IT WOULD BE IMPOSSIBLE. WELL, I AGREE. FOR AN ORDINARY GUY LIKE HIM TO TAKE THE TEST.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: LOOK! IT'S THE BALL!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: ISN'T IT HARSH TO PUT THE WHITE STEEL EEL? SOMETHING THAT STRONG IS USUALLY USED ON TESTS ABOVE THE 20TH FLOOR.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: IS IT TO MAKE HIM GIVE UP?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: HEADON DOESN'T LIKE IT WHEN IRREGULARS ARRIVE.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LET'S SEE. SO MAYBE HE'S TRYING TO SCARE THE BOY TO MAKE HIM GIVE UP.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BUT ANYWAYS, WHETHER HE TAKES THE TEST OR NOT, THERE IS NO CHANCE THAT BOY WILL MAKE IT UP INTO THE INNER TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: EVEN IF HE TAKES THE TEST, HE'LL EVENTUALLY DIE.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: POOR KID. SHOULD WE GIVE HIM A HAND?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAT?! W-WHY SHOULD WE?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: FOR A LITTLE EXCITEMENT, IRREGULARS HAVE ALWAYS BROUGHT CHAOS TO THE TOWER.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WE DON'T NEED ANY CHAOS! IRREGULARS ARE NOT WELCOMED HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HM...

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: I MEAN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: NO! YOU SHOULDN'T HELP HIM! IF THE KING FINDS OUT, WE'RE ALL DEAD! DEAD, YOU KNOW?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HM. BESIDES! HE WON'T TAKE THE TEST ANYWAY, SO IT DOESN'T MATTER!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BUT LOOK AT HIM! HE'S RUNNING! WHAAAT?! WHY, WHY IS HE RUNNING?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WHY? WHY ARE YOU RUNNING?! A BEAM SHOOTING OUT FROM BETWEEN YOUR LEGS WON'T HELP!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IS HE TAKING THE TEST? IS HE NUTS?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: AHAHAHAHA! I KNEW HE WOULDN'T DISAPPOINT ME! NOW THIS IS FUN!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN! I'LL BE BACK SOON!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAAAT?! LADY YURI! DON'T! MY LADY! PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: DON'T WORRY, EVAN! She's LOST HER MIND AGAIN. I'M WORRIED IT'LL BE OFF WITH MY HEAD, NOT YOURS, MY LADY.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: JUMP

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: STAH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: PO

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHAT? IT'S A GIANT EEL?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: HUMP

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TAP

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OH, SHE IS...

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: PHEW

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY, NEW GUY, YOU GOT A DEATHWISH? HUH?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY, ANSWER ME.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: Ooh, WHO'S THIS GIRL?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: DO YOU UNDERSTAND WHAT I'M SAYING?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHAT IS SHE SAYING?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY, HEADON, DON'T TELL ME THAT YOU DIDN'T EVEN GIVE HIM A POCKET YET.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: OH! COME TO THINK OF IT, I FORGOT TO GIVE HIM ONE.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: YOU FORGOT? YOU'RE THE OLDEST GUARDIAN IN THE TOWER, AREN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I THINK IT WAS ON PURPOSE.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: NO WAY. I, TOO, MAKE MISTAKES SOMETIMES.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! EVAN! DON'T JUST STAND THERE, COME DOWN HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OH COME ON... WHY IS SHE CALLING ME WHEN HEADON'S STANDING RIGHT THERE?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY! EVAN! COME DOWN! QUICK! DAMN IT! WHATEVER! EVAN!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I KNEW YOU WERE HERE, BOY.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: THUMP

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: EVAN EDROCK! HA, HAHA, HA! YOU STILL LOOK VERY YOUNG AND HEALTHY! HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: L-LONG TIME NO SEE, MR. HEADON!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: CUT THE CRAP. YOU HAVE EXTRA POCKETS, DON'T YOU? GIVE ONE TO THIS BOY.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEADON DIDN'T EVEN GIVE A POCKET TO THE POOR KID.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OKAY, OKAY.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THIS IS WHY YOU CALLED ME DOWN HERE?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LET'S SEE, WHERE ARE MY EXTRA POCKETS? OH! HERE'S ONE! FOR YOU, NEW GUY. AN 'A-GRADE' POCKET IS TOO GENEROUS SINCE YOU'RE NEW, BUT THIS IS ALL I'VE GOT FOR NOW.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: KISS

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SEARCH

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHAT'S THAT MARBLE? IS THAT FOR ME?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: WHIR

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: PRETTY GOOD, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: WHAT'S YOUR FIRST IMPRESSION OF THE POCKET?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: YOU CAN UNDERSTAND WHAT I'M SAYING NOW, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: HUH? THE LANGUAGE?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: APEH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: HOVQ

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THAT POCKET IS RANKED WAY TOO HIGH FOR YOU! SAY THANK YOU, KID!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HOW IS IT? DO YOU UNDERSTAND WHAT I'M SAYING NOW?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I CAN UNDERSTAND THEIR LANGUAGE NOW.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: IS IT THIS MARBLE? IS IT BECAUSE OF THIS MARBLE? DOES THE MARBLE ALLOW ME TO UNDERSTAND YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: BINGO! THAT'S RIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: T-THAT'S IMPOSSIBLE.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: IT'S NOTHING TO BE SURPRISED AT.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LET ME INTRODUCE MYSELF. I'M EVAN EDROCK, AN 'A-RANK GUIDE' AND A 'RANKER' OF THE TOWER. THAT LADY OVER THERE IS LADY YURI, ALSO A 'RANKER' OF THE TOWER. WHAT I GAVE YOU IS WHAT'S CALLED A 'Pocket'. IT IS ESSENTIAL WHEN GOING UP THE TOWER. THERE ARE A LOT OF FUNCTIONS, BUT FIRST OF ALL, IT TRANSLATES EVERY LANGUAGE OF THE TOWER TO MACSETHIAN.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: AND ONE MORE THING, SAY 'INVISIBLE MODE' TO THE POCKET.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: S

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: INVISIBLE MODE! OH! THE MARBLE DISAPPEARED!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: DON'T PANIC, IT IS JUST INVISIBLE. SAY 'VISIBLE MODE' AND IT WILL APPEAR AGAIN.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: OH, THANK YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEADON, ARE YOU REALLY GOING TO GO SO FAR TO FORCE HIM OUT JUST BECAUSE HE'S AN IRREGULAR?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: TADA!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YOU MISUNDERSTAND, PRINCESS.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: I AM CARRYING OUT THE TEST LEGITIMATELY. I WOULD NEVER TRY TO JUST KICK HIM OUT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BE REASONABLE, HEADON. THE TEST SUITS FLOORS ABOVE 20.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: PRINCESS YURI, HAVE YOU FORGOTTEN THAT HE'S AN IRREGULAR? THE IRREGULARS WHO HAVE ENTERED THE TOWER ALL HAD EXTRAORDINARY POWERS. THIS IS AN APPROPRIATE TEST FOR AN IRREGULAR, BECAUSE THEY ARE SPECIAL.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: UM, SORRY TO INTERRUPT, YOU KEEP SAYING THAT I AM AN IRREGULAR. WHAT IS THAT?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: IT'S THE NAME FOR THOSE WHO OPEN THE GATE AND ENTER THE TOWER ON THEIR OWN. IRREGULARS AREN'T CHOSEN TO ENTER THE TOWER. THIS TOWER IS ONLY MEANT FOR THE CHOSEN, BUT ON RARE OCCASIONS, IRREGULARS LIKE YOU WHO WEREN'T CHOSEN FIND THEIR WAY IN.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: SINCE ANCIENT TIMES, THE IRREGULARS HAVE BROUGHT CHAOS AND CHANGE BECAUSE THEY HAVE EXTRAORDINARY STRENGTH. THEY ARE FEARED BY OTHERS.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BUT, LOOK! THIS ONE IS DIFFERENT FROM THE OTHER IRREGULARS! WHAT? HE'S SMALL! HE DOESN'T HAVE ANY SPECIAL ABILITIES. WELL, HE DOES LOOK LIKE HE'LL GROW HANDSOME IN THE FUTURE, BUT EVEN EVAN, OUR A-RANKED GUIDE HERE, ADMITTED HE'S JUST AN ORDINARY BOY! HA HA! HE'S LIKE A BABY NEXT TO THE OTHER IRREGULARS! SO WHAT I MEAN IS, MR. HEADON... WOULDN'T IT BE FAIR TO LOWER THE TEST LEVEL?

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: PAT PAT

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: PRINCESS, YOU REALLY WANT HIM TO GO UP THE TOWER, DON'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: HMM, THEN VERY WELL, I'LL CHANGE THE RULES SLIGHTLY.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: OH! REALLY?!

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: HOW ABOUT THIS? YOU LEND HIM ONE OF THE WEAPONS THAT YOU OWN.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: LEND HIM MY WEAPON?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YES. YOUR WEAPONS ARE ONLY FOR HIGH RANKERS.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: IF YOU LEND HIM ONE, IT WILL BE A HUGE ADVANTAGE FOR HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: HM, BY THE WAY, DON'T YOU HAVE THE 'BLACK MARCH' BESTOWED BY THE KING?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BLACK MARCH? ACTUALLY, LENDING WEAPONS IS AGAINST THE RULES.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: HM. BUT IF YOU SAY THAT YOU'LL LEND HIM THE BLACK MARCH, I WILL ALLOW IT.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: THE BLACK MARCH IS TOO... DO YOU THINK IT'S TOO MUCH?

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: SO YOU WANT TO SEND THE BOY UP, BUT YOU DON'T WANT TO LEND SOMETHING OF YOURS TO HIM?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: BASTARD. YOU KNOW WHAT KIND OF WEAPON THE BLACK MARCH IS.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: WELL, IF YOU SAY IT'S TOO MUCH TO SPARE FOR HIM, HE WILL HAVE TO TAKE THE TEST WITH HIS BARE HANDS.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: FINE

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: HEY, NEW BOY! WHAT'S YOUR NAME?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I'M BAM. TWENTY-FIFTH BAM.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: ALRIGHT, BAM! WANNA GO UP THE TOWER? OR GIVE UP?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: I... I CAN'T GIVE UP! I NEED TO FIND SOMEONE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: FIND SOMEONE? YOU LITTLE PLAYER! ARE YOU ALREADY DATING SOMEONE?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WOW. IT'S NOT LIKE THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YOU MIGHT DIE. THERE'S A HIGH POSSIBILITY THAT YOU'LL DIE BEFORE YOU FIND WHAT YOU SEEK. STILL WANNA GO?

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: IT DOESN'T MATTER, I'LL GO ANYWAY.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: WELL, OKAY! ARMS INVENTORY, VISIBLE MODE.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SH

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: GWYZ

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: TAKE THIS. THIS IS THE BLACK MARCH.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I'LL LEND IT TO YOU FOR A WHILE.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: PASS

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: SWOOSH

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LADY YURI! YOU CAN'T DO THAT! HOW CAN YOU LEND SOMETHING LIKE THE BLACK MARCH?! YOU MUSTN'T! NEVER! YOU'LL BE KILLED IF THE KING FINDS OUT!

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: IT... IT'S OKAY. YOU SHOULDN'T LEND ME SUCH A PRECIOUS THING, FOR MY SAKE.

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: TAKE IT. DIDN'T YOU WANT TO GO UP NO MATTER WHAT? THEN TAKE THIS.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: GRAB

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: THE NAME OF THE WEAPON IS BLACK MARCH. IT IS A 'NEEDLE', A BASIC WEAPON OF THE TOWER. A NEEDLE IS USED TO STAB AND PIERCE. THE BLACK MARCH IS THE GREATEST OF THE NEEDLES. IT'S ONE OF THE 13 MONTH SERIES THAT ASKLL EDWARL CREATED. IT'S LIKE A HALF-LIVING THING, SO ONCE YOU IGNITE IT, IT SHOWS EXTREME POWER. OF COURSE, EVEN IF YOU TAKE THIS NEEDLE, THERE IS LITTLE CHANCE OF YOU WINNING. THE WEAPON'S STRENGTH DEPENDS ON THE WIELDER, NO MATTER HOW GOOD IT IS. BUT IF YOU STILL WANT TO TAKE THIS TEST, I WILL LEND IT TO YOU, SO TRY IT.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LADY! NOT THE BLACK MARCH! PLEASE!

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: SHUT UP, I'LL DO AS I PLEASE.

dialogue.speaker: Bam
dialogue.line: THANK YOU.

dialogue.speaker: sfx
dialogue.line: THUMP THUMP

dialogue.speaker: Headon
dialogue.line: YURI, PROMISE TO GIVE THIS BACK.

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: LADY YURI, WHY ARE YOU HELPING THAT BOY BY GIVING HIM THE BLACK MARCH?

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: PERHAPS YOU FELL IN LOVE AT FIRST SIGHT? OR...

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: SHUT UP, YOU IDIOT!

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: OUCH! LADY, DO YOU REALLY THINK...

dialogue.speaker: Evan
dialogue.line: THAT IRREGULARS WILL CHANGE THE TOWER?

dialogue.speaker: Yuri
dialogue.line: I DON'T HAVE TIME FOR IDLE FANCIES. I'VE JUST TAKEN A LIKING TO HIM, THAT'S ALL.

summary: Princess Yuri discovers an Irregular, Bam, has entered the Tower and insists on watching his first test. Despite Bam appearing ordinary and struggling with Headon's difficult challenge, Yuri intervenes by lending him the legendary Black March, a powerful weapon, against her guide Evan's strong objections and Headon's initial rules. Bam accepts the weapon, determined to climb the Tower to find someone important to him.
